name: Helena's Hawaiian Food
tagline: James Beard Award winner in a Kalihi strip mall — the pipikaula short ribs will ruin you for all other beef.
mustOrder: Hawaiian plate (pipikaula short ribs, lomi salmon, poi, haupia)
parking: Strip mall parking lot on N. School St in Kalihi
talkStory: Founded 1946 by Helen 'Helena' Chock. Won the James Beard America's Classics Award in 2000 — the only traditional Hawaiian food restaurant ever honored. Eat poi with two fingers, never a fork. Don't make a face at poi — it's sacred.
